---
name: Bug report
about: Report a crash or issue with an Electron app on Windows 11
labels: bug
---

**Electron app affected**
e.g. Discord, Slack, VS Code, Notion, Obsidian, Spotify

**Describe the issue**
Clear description of what happens — crash on launch, intermittent crash, specific feature triggers it, etc.

**Error details**
```
Paste any error code, event log entry, or crash dialog text here
```
Common: `0x80000003`, `STATUS_BREAKPOINT`, `GPU process didn't start`

**Did the IFEO fix help?**
- [ ] Yes — the app works after following install steps A/B/C
- [ ] No — still crashes after applying the fix
- [ ] Haven't tried yet

**System info**
- Windows version (run `winver`): e.g. 24H2 (26100.xxxx)
- GPU model:
- Driver version:
- App version:

**Additional context**
Anything else — recent Windows updates, driver changes, other fixes you've tried.
